title: Provision of Office Renovation Works for Accountant-General's Department's Office at MND Complex Annexe A #04-05
procurement_method: Open Tender Lite Request for Proposal No GRA Supply/Work Heads [Tendering Capacity] Please refer to the tender documents to find out if the Government Registration Authority (GRA) registration is a critical (i.e. mandatory), non-critical or fully exempted evaluation criterion.
awarding_contact_address: 0000 NIL SITE BRIEFING Add to Calendar Attendance Compulsory Yes Briefing Date 27 Apr 2026 Briefing Time 02:00PM Venue MND Complex Annexe A #04-05 Remarks A mandatory site show round will be held on 27 April 2026 at 2pm (Singapore date and time). The site show round will be held physically at the new office premise: MND Complex Annexe A #04-05. Attendance for the site show round is compulsory. Failure to attend this site show round will result in the proposal being disqualified from further evaluation. Tenderers are required to register their attendance via https://go.gov.sg/agdrenositeshowroundregistration by 5pm on 24 April 2026 (Singapore date and time). The Tenderer shall provide all details as requested in the form. Each Tenderer is only required to do one (1) submission. Where multiple forms are submitted, the Authority will only rely on the latest submission for each Tenderer. Each Tenderer is allowed to have a maximum of three (3) personnel attending the site show round. Only registered personnel will be allowed to attend the site show round. CONTACT PERSON'S DETAILS 0000

title: Procurement of Design and Build Services for Office Renovation
remarks: TERM NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT (NDA): For access to the tender documents, tenderers are required quote their Term NDA Ref No. if they have a valid Term NDA with LTA. Otherwise, tenderers are required to complete and submit the attached Term NDA. Please refer to the attached Term NDA notice for submission. You are required to declare that you have read and will abide by the terms and conditions as set out in the Term NDA upon declaration. The Authority reserve the right to require Tenderers to resubmit the Term NDA, if they are found to be incomplete or erroneously submitted. CRITICAL CRITERIA: Registration with GeBIZ and the eligibility criteria as specified below are critical criteria for this Invitation to Tender. Tenderers who do not meet these criteria will NOT be considered. Registration with the BCA with the designated registration head & grade as specified in this clause is a critical criterion. Tenderers must be registered with the following Building and Construction Authority (BCA) Workhead: CW01 General Building with Financial Grade B1 and above. Attendance at the Tender Briefing / Site Showround is mandatory and is considered a critical criterion. Failure to attend the Tender Briefing / Site Showround will result in the disqualification of the Tenderer's submission. SUBMISSION: The 2-envelope bidding system in the GeBIZ is adopted for this Tender. Tenderers are required to separate their offer into 2 distinct Document Types (i.e. Price and Technical). It is mandatory to upload at least one attachment for each Document Type when submitting electronically via GeBIZ. Please refer to Clauses 5 of the Instructions to Tenderers (ITT) for details. EVALUATION: Please refer to Clause 4 of the Instructions to Tenderers (ITT) for details.
